# Curated CORPORATE-ACTION allowlist for no_extreme_backfill_jump (task #17).
#
# A >3x day-over-day jump in a backfill daily close is EITHER a real corporate action
# (forward/reverse split) OR a mixed split-adjustment artifact (a split landing mid-backfill
# leaves pre-split months on the old adjustment basis — the KLAC class). We have NO corporate-
# action data feed yet, so confirmed-REAL actions are listed here so they don't false-positive;
# everything else >3x is flagged as a candidate artifact to fix + re-fetch.
#
# Maintenance: prod verifies each flagged name under task #17; add the confirmed-REAL ones here
# (artifacts like KLAC are NOT added — they must stay flagged until the backfill is re-fetched).
# Format: SYMBOL            (exempts that symbol's jumps), or
#         SYMBOL<TAB>DATE   (exempts only the jump on that ET session date — preferred).
#
# 2026-06-12 sweep: prod verified all 10 non-KLAC names against Alpaca live (match to the cent)
# -> CONFIRMED REAL events (IPOs, reverse/forward splits, restructurings). Encoded surgically by
# (symbol, ET date) so ONLY the verified jump is exempt — a future artifact on the same name
# still flags. KLAC is the lone ARTIFACT and is intentionally NOT listed (re-fetch queued #17).
ABVX	2025-07-23
ASTC	2026-05-27
BMNR	2025-06-30
FIG	2025-07-31
INHD	2023-12-15
INHD	2025-08-25
INHD	2026-06-08
QXO	2023-12-04
QXO	2024-07-30
RXT	2026-02-18
STI	2026-06-04
STRC	2025-07-30
WOLF	2025-09-29
